title: Avoid using increment and decrement operators in method calls or mixed expressions
description: Increment (++) and decrement (--) operators should not be used within method calls or combined with other operators in a single expression. Such usage can make code harder to read and maintain, and may introduce subtle bugs due to unexpected evaluation order. Refactor code to use these operators in standalone statements for clarity and reliability.
recommendation: Use increment and decrement operators only in standalone statements, not within method calls or mixed with other operators.

checks.message: Use increment and decrement operators only in standalone statements, not within method calls or mixed with other operators.
